basic_details.job_title: CUSB Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Central University of South Bihar (CUSB) Recruitment 2026: Central University of South Bihar has released the official notification for 1 Project Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation is admissible as per ANRF guidelines.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.cusb.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CUSB Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CUSB Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CUSB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CUSB Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CUSB Project Assistant Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation is admissible as per ANRF guidelines.

content_sections.heading: CUSB Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.cusb.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CUSB Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUSB Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the CUSB Project Assistant position is 28th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B. Sc. degree in Chemistry to be eligible for the Project Assistant position at the Central University of South Bihar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant post is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per the guidelines mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the salary for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant role will receive a salary of Rs. 27,000 per month, along with HRA.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for CUSB Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for the CUSB Project Assistant recruitment. This applies to all categories, including General, OBC, SC, and ST candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position at CUSB will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position at the Central University of South Bihar is a contractual job. The duration of the contract will be as per the terms and conditions specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Central University of South Bihar, which is www.cusb.ac.in.

faq.question: Q9. How should I submit the application form?
faq.answer: The application form should be submitted offline via post. Ensure to send the completed form along with all required documents to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates along with the application form.
